title: oberonia spathulata
intro: Oberonia spathulata, also known as the Spatulate Oberonia, is a species of orchid that is native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Oberonia spathulata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Oberonia spathulata may include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
